input_context.decision_surface: XRPL validator amendment decision surface for Tickets.

source_facts.claim: Tickets: This amendment was replaced by the TicketBatch amendment.
XRPL amendment voting requires sustained validator supermajority before activation; incompatible servers can become amendment-blocked.
